creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: danilo
Date: Wed Sep 25 05:24:40 2013
New Revision: 328254
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/328254

Log:
  - Fix build on CURRENT [1]
  - Convert USE_GMAKE to USES
  - Use options helpers
  - Add staging support
  - Change maintainer email to @FreeBSD.org
  
  PR:		ports/182240 [1]
  Submitted by:	Jan Beich <jbeich@tormail.org>
  Approved by:	culot (mentor)

Modified:
  head/devel/ragel/Makefile
  head/devel/ragel/pkg-plist

Modified: head/devel/ragel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/ragel/Makefile	Wed Sep 25 04:33:54 2013	(r328253)
+++ head/devel/ragel/Makefile	Wed Sep 25 05:24:40 2013	(r328254)
@@ -3,50 +3,43 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	ragel
 PORTVERSION=	6.8
+PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.complang.org/ragel/
 
-MAINTAINER=	danilogondolfo@gmail.com
+MAINTAINER=	danilo@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Compile regular languages into executable C/C++ code
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv2 GPLv3
 LICENSE_COMB=	dual
 
-USE_GMAKE=	yes
+USES=	gmake
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 
-MAN1=		${PORTNAME}.1
-
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS EXAMPLES
+DOCS_CONFIGURE_ENABLE=	manual
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
 USE_TEX=	latex:build
-CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--enable-manual
 BUILD_DEPENDS+=	fig2dev:${PORTSDIR}/print/transfig
-PLIST_SUB+=	DOCS=""
-.else
-PLIST_SUB+=	DOCS="@comment "
 .endif
 
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MEXAMPLES}
-PLIST_SUB+=	EXAMPLES=""
-.else
-PLIST_SUB+=	EXAMPLES="@comment "
-.endif
+post-patch:
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} 's/setiosflags/std::&/' \
+		${WRKSRC}/ragel/javacodegen.cpp
 
 do-install:
-	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/ragel/${PORTNAME} ${PREFIX}/bin
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/doc/${PORTNAME}.1 ${MANPREFIX}/man/man1
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/ragel/${PORTNAME} ${STAGEDIR}/${PREFIX}/bin
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/doc/${PORTNAME}.1 ${STAGEDIR}/${MANPREFIX}/man/man1
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
-	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/doc/*.pdf ${DOCSDIR}
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}/${DOCSDIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/doc/*.pdf ${STAGEDIR}/${DOCSDIR}
 .endif
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MEXAMPLES}
-	@${MKDIR} ${EXAMPLESDIR}
-	@(cd ${WRKSRC}/test; ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${EXAMPLESDIR})
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}/${EXAMPLESDIR}
+	@(cd ${WRKSRC}/test; ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${STAGEDIR}/${EXAMPLESDIR})
 .endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

==============================================================================
